column1: # Cook County IL (17031) HUD CHAS Table 9 county cost-burden-by-race fixture (2017-2021 ACS 5-year).
# Household counts are curated published cells from HUD CHAS Table 9 county summary level 050.
# Share is computed in the mapper as cost_burden_gt30_households / total_households × 100 (one decimal).
